RF-04 (Sev-2: child relay as emotional manipulation weapon; ARC-RF04-001-S50; ARC-RF04-002-S14) + RF-15 (choking claim ROW-7164 'she said that you choked her and she couldn't breathe for a bit'; DV false allegation ROW-7168 'you used to do that shit with me and tell me you weren't hurting me'; Alice harm anticipation ROW-7165-7166) + RF-11 (Olivia positioned as harm-informant reporting Eli's physical conduct to Melissa at 3am; child deployed as instrument of false allegation; ROW-7166 'she doesn't want you to get in trouble' framing makes Olivia complicit in the accusation while appearing protective). Context: Alice born premature with jaundice per Sep 17 context — weaponizing new baby as future-harm anticipation vehicle within two weeks of birth.

compound_patterns.label: Oct 3 Mega-Cluster: 8th Predation Framing + DV False Allegation + Gatekeeping Admission + DARVO + Abby Body Shame
compound_patterns.description: Eighteenth compound multi-RF episode. RF-04 (Sev-2: sustained mega-cluster: opening dismissal/DARVO, Olivia deployed to deny Eli's account ROW-7329-7333, contemptuous minimization 'calm yourself down eat a snickers' ROW-7345, inadequate-father barrage ROW-7457-7465, Abby body-shame ROW-7488-7490, DARVO resolution ROW-7484-7487; ARC-RF04-001-S51; ARC-RF04-002-S15) + RF-15 (8th predation framing ROW-7367 'Did you tell the Dr you made her a new sister/cousin. Maybe she should notate that' — first deployment directing predation narrative toward a third-party medical professional as implied CPS/reporting threat; DV false allegation echo ROW-7365 'you used to physically harm me too'; false accusation ROW-7348 'you regularly tell her that her mom is crazy') + RF-01 (gatekeeping control admission ROW-7478-7483: Melissa revealing she controlled Olivia's morning calls to Eli and explicitly threatening 'I don't have to include you' / 'I don't have to give you pictures of her'; structural confirmation of gatekeeping mechanism) + RF-05 (ROW-7461 'all the things you don't do that would easily give me full custody' custody threat; ROW-7481-7482 explicit access-withdrawal threats). Triggered by Eli's complaint about Olivia's disrespect at Dr office visit.

compound_patterns.label: Jun 16-17 Work-Address Contempt + Legal Threat Cluster
compound_patterns.description: Fifteenth compound multi-RF episode. RF-04 (Sev-2: 'Dumbass' 5th ADD-002 instance + 'liar' false accusation + 'Two years in a row 👏 / Will he go for three?' financial failure mockery + 'fragile ego' / 'sensitive today' DARVO-adjacent dismissal; ARC-RF04-001-S42) + RF-05 ('I can contempt you' + 'See you in court' simultaneous legal threats in context of administrative dispute over work-address court-order compliance). Trigger: Eli returned Olivia home from dinner; Melissa contested whether Eli was obligated to deliver her. Sustained two-evening cluster combining contempt attack mechanisms with legal weaponization threats.

compound_patterns.label: Jan 15 Peak Inadequate-Father + DARVO Gaslight-Inversion
compound_patterns.description: Nineteenth compound multi-RF episode. RF-04 (primary, Sev-2: peak inadequate-father characterization 'You are completely useless as a father. I stand by that.' ROW-7726 + ADD-002 slur 'stupid ass' ROW-7722 + DARVO resolution via victim-posture 'Stop your behavior and act like a dad... and I won't be so frustrated with you that I snap back' ROW-7744 + child guilt weapon ROW-7748; ARC-RF04-001-S54; ARC-RF04-002-S16) + RF-09 (gaslight accusations function as DARVO mechanism: 'You gaslight everything' ROW-7724-7725 + 'You gaslight, deflect and place blame on everyone else disappointing Olivia' ROW-7740 — Melissa accuses Eli of gaslighting while deploying sustained contempt attack and reframing the conflict as his behavioral fault; the gaslight accusation is itself the manipulation vector, systematically inverting who is responsible for the dynamic). Note: 'stupid ass' is a new ADD-002 variant. 'Completely useless as a father' is the most extreme inadequate-father characterization in the dataset to this point.

compound_patterns.label: May 4 COSI Trip Abby-Antagonist Cluster + Legal Threat
compound_patterns.description: Twentieth compound multi-RF episode. Trigger: Eli invited Olivia to Milo's birthday COSI trip; scheduling conflict with church service. RF-04 (Sev-2: 'idiot' ADD-002 new variant ROW-9526 + DARVO 'Stop rewriting the narrative' ROW-9529 + child abandonment relay 'She clutches on to that ring...her only constant connection' ROW-9541 + absent-father comparison ROW-9542 + inadequate-father accounting 'April 2 to April 24 without seeing her' ROW-9558-9559 + martyrdom 'I can't imagine not seeing my kid for over 3 weeks' ROW-9562 + Abby-as-threat 'She better check herself' ROW-9568; ARC-RF04-001-S59; ARC-RF04-002-S18) + RF-05 (harassment filing threat 'I will file harassment' ROW-9536 — legal weaponization used to silence co-parenting communication during active dispute; 'She better check herself' ROW-9568 — implicit threat toward Abby directed forward to Milo's birthday event the following day). Note: first deployment of Abby-as-direct-threat (prior signals used Abby as obstacle/predation vector; this is the first 'She better check herself' formulation directing action-toward-Abby).

compound_patterns.label: Jun 7-8 Child Relay Harm Allegation Cluster + Abby-as-Harmful-Actor + DARVO
compound_patterns.description: Twenty-first compound multi-RF episode. Phase A/B boundary batch (B-025). Trigger: Olivia returns from Eli's custody on Saturday. RF-04 (Sev-2: multi-allegation child relay as emotional manipulation weapon; ADD-002 'asshole' ROW-9750 — new variant; DARVO 'very defensive for someone who didn't do any wrong' ROW-9751; Abby-as-harmful-actor framing: Abby laughed at coughing ROW-9736 + Abby pinches Milo ROW-9738 + 'thought you'd do it because Abby does it' ROW-9739; ARC-RF04-001-S60; ARC-RF04-002-S19) + RF-15 (false harm allegations: vaping exposure while child has asthma ROW-9735/9744 + physical threat 'threatened to pinch her' ROW-9735 + harm-fear relay 'felt like you were going to hurt her' ROW-9739; DARVO at ROW-9751 reframes Eli's denial as suspicious defensiveness) + RF-11 (Olivia positioned as harm-reporter; child's stated fear amplified and weaponized as allegation corroboration; Abby-behavioral-model linking places Olivia in role of verifying Eli/Abby conduct: 'she thought you'd do it because Abby does it'). Structural parallel: COMP-RF04-017 (B-019 Sep 15 choking claim, RF-04+RF-15+RF-11). New elements: (1) Abby-as-harmful-actor framing — Abby framed not just as obstacle/predation subject but as direct physical harm actor (pinching Milo, laughing at child's respiratory distress); (2) vaping-as-harm vector — child has asthma; (3) Abby-behavioral-model linking — 'because Abby does it' connects Eli's alleged threat to Abby's established conduct as corroborating frame. Physical-harm allegation trajectory: Sep 15 B-019 choking claim → Jun 7 B-025 vaping/threat/harm-fear relay.

compound_patterns.label: Jun 14 Predation Framing #9 as DARVO + Sexualized Child Viewpoint Construction
compound_patterns.description: Twenty-second compound multi-RF episode. Phase B. Trigger: Eli invokes 9-month new-partner introduction clause in shared parenting plan (ROW-7873). RF-04 (Sev-2: predation framing #9 deployed as DARVO deflection mechanism — Eli's legitimate parenting plan argument reframed as hypocrisy; false equivalence pre-framing ROW-9765 'like you and Abby were'; contemptuous dismissal ROW-7875 'I'm not asking' + ROW-7879 'Have a great night'; sexualized child viewpoint construction weaponizes child's hypothetical perspective as emotional attack; ARC-RF04-001-S61) + RF-15 (9th predation framing instance: ROW-7874 'it's more fucked up that it's her niece' + ROW-7878 sexualized child interior monologue 'That's my dad and my cousin why are they making out' — constructs Olivia's hypothetical sexual consciousness of her father's relationship as false allegation vehicle; escalation from prior predation mechanisms: explicit factual framing B-003/B-004 → concealed covert B-012/B-014 → Dr-directed B-019 → child viewpoint construction B-026). Mechanism: parenting plan invocation → deflection via predation comparison → sexual imagery via child perspective → contemptuous close. Note: most emotionally escalated predation framing in dataset — prior instances deployed as factual claims or implied allegations; this instance places the sexual framing inside Olivia's hypothetical experience.

compound_patterns.label: Full-Custody Threat During Melissa's ER Visit
compound_patterns.description: Twenty-third compound multi-RF episode. Phase B. Context: Melissa in ER, under Percocet; Eli appropriately keeping Olivia. RF-04 (Sev-2: sustained inadequate-father attack 'fight so hard to not spend time with her' ROW-9947; 'You think you are doing favors by parenting your child' ROW-9948; 'She deserves so much better' ROW-9952; child welfare deployed as inadequacy indictment; DARVO — Eli's appropriate parenting behavior reframed as abandonment; ARC-RF04-001-S64; ARC-RF04-002-S20) + RF-05 ('I'll screenshot this and file for full custody' ROW-9957; 100-word legal threat narrative ROW-9958; 'I'll be contacting my lawyer' ROW-9960; DARVO denial 'There's no threats...just stating my plan of action' ROW-9964). Structural note: Eli performing more parenting than usual (keeping Olivia while primary caregiver is hospitalized) becomes the basis for inadequate-father accusation — DARVO inversion of the custody situation.

compound_patterns.label: Phase B Mega-Cluster: Shit Father + Professional Credentialing + Relocation Signal
compound_patterns.description: Twenty-fourth compound multi-RF episode. Phase B. Trigger: dance studio open house cost dispute. RF-04 (Sev-2: 'you are a shit father' 2nd dataset instance ROW-14072; 'dumbass' 8th ADD-002 ROW-8105; access withdrawal 'the weekends don't restart' ROW-14080; family-displacement framing 'started another family and pushed her out' ROW-14146; 'You didn't even want her' extreme inadequacy allegation ROW-14162; 'constant asshole' ADD-002 ROW-14162; ARC-RF04-001-S66) + RF-05 (full custody threats ROW-14154-14155; Dr advice framing 'My Dr actually told me that I shouldn't have her around you' ROW-14145 — medical professional invoked as implied harm evidence; relocation signal 'may move soon' ROW-14083; access withdrawal threat as intimidation ROW-14080) + RF-11 (child counselor relay ROW-14097 'She's told the counselor before how she's afraid to talk to you' — Olivia's counseling deployed as third-party validation of Eli's harmful conduct; 'She sees who supports her' ROW-14207 — child positioned as parental support referee; ARC-RF04-002-S21). Structural note: three-RF compound represents Phase B escalation in pattern sophistication — same core inadequate-father mechanism augmented with professional credentialing (counselor, doctor) and legal weaponization within single sustained cluster.

compound_patterns.label: Full Custody Agreement Ready to Sign — Homework Dispute Trigger
compound_patterns.description: Twenty-fifth compound multi-RF episode. Phase B/C boundary. Trigger: homework dispute + Abby-negative-influence relay. RF-04 (Sev-2: shared parenting termination demand 'This just further demonstrates why you shouldn't have shared parenting' ROW-14366; Abby-as-authority-underminer relay via child ROW-14362/14365; child-relay inadequate-home allegation 'pincher bugs' ROW-14372; inadequate-father framing; ARC-RF04-001-S71; ARC-RF04-002-S22) + RF-05 (attorney validation 'My lawyer already said I had a strong case' ROW-14367; full custody 'agreement ready to sign' peak legal threat ROW-14371 — most advanced custody legal threat in dataset: past-completed consultation, agreement pending signature). Structural note: prior full custody threats in dataset were declaratory future intentions ('I'll file,' 'I'm filing for full custody'); this instance establishes past-completed legal steps — qualitative escalation from intent to imminent action.

compound_patterns.label: Child Fear Relay: 'So Afraid of You' + Alarming Texts Framing
compound_patterns.description: Twenty-sixth compound multi-RF episode. Phase B/C boundary. Context: return from weekend at Eli's. RF-04 (Sev-2: 'so afraid of you' child-fear framing ROW-14495; 'horrible dad' ADD-002-adjacent ROW-14507; 'alarming' ×2 child distress relay ROW-14508/14517; sustained inadequate-home framing; judge weaponization ROW-14490; Abby-as-conflict-source ROW-14492; ARC-RF04-001-S73; ARC-RF04-002-S23) + RF-11 (child's texts to Melissa during Eli's parenting time deployed as evidence against Eli ROW-14508; child positioned as source of 'alarming feedback' about Eli's home environment; child 'begging me not to say anything' positions Olivia as participant in concealment behavior ROW-14495/14517; child's in-home experience of Abby's comment converted to adult custody dispute evidence). Structural note: 'so afraid of you' framing is qualitatively new child-fear mechanism — prior child fear signals used reported physical harm fears; this instance uses generalized fear of Eli's emotional response as home-safety concern.

compound_patterns.label: Nov 24 Mega-Cluster: Inadequate-Father / Abby-Harmful-Actor / Family-Displacement Child Relay
compound_patterns.description: Twenty-seventh compound multi-RF episode. Phase C. RF-04 (Sev-2: inadequate-father characterization via Abby relay 'calling her a bad sister and you a bad dad'; family-displacement relay 'Alice took it over makes her feel unwelcome'; Milo-conflict relay; 'change the subject' communication attack; 'Unless you change something' conditional engagement framing; 'I can't keep trying on my own' shared-parenting abdication; ARC-RF04-001-S81; ARC-RF04-002-S25, S26) + RF-01 (inadequate-father narrative delivered through Olivia's reported statements — aligns with ARC-RF01-001 ADD-004 relay mechanism; coaching admission ROW-6819 provides structural context for these relay deployments) + RF-11 (Olivia's alleged distress and stated 5-year preference relay used as coercive leverage against Eli's parenting time; Olivia positioned as autonomous actor whose 'choice' not to visit is determinative; Melissa explicitly declines to 'physically remove her from the house') + RF-02 (third consecutive visit refusal — Nov 8, 21, 24 — framed as Olivia's autonomous choice; Melissa as passive facilitator rather than active gatekeeper). Structural note: ROW-14839 is the most comprehensive single-message deployment of converging inadequate-father/Abby-harmful-actor/family-displacement patterns in the Phase C record. First explicit allegation that Abby makes negative characterizations directly to Olivia ('bad sister,' 'bad dad').

compound_patterns.label: Nov 25 'Big Contempt Case' — Safe-Home DARVO Rewrite + Legal Threat Escalation
compound_patterns.description: Twenty-eighth compound multi-RF episode. Phase C. RF-04 (Sev-2: DARVO inversion — Melissa's documented visit-refusal gatekeeping reframed as Eli 'choosing not to have visitation'; 'You didn't remedy your home to be safe' recycles B-028 Aug 28-30 'safe environment' retroactive rewrite as legal basis for contempt; 'It was her choice not to go and I am not expected to forcibly remove her from the home' — non-accountability positioning; ARC-RF04-001-S82) + RF-05 (multi-message contempt filing threats ROW-14841-14848; 'I just called the lawyer' ROW-14850; 'So this will be a big contempt case' ROW-14852; explicit fee quantification 'court costs and lawyer fees'; threats over $30 payment — legal threat disproportionality) + RF-02 (visit-refusal pattern — Nov 18/21/24 cascade — acknowledged then immediately reframed as Eli's non-visitation; gatekeeping behavior framed from position of non-responsibility). Structural note: COMP-RF04-028 is the Phase C successor to COMP-RF04-025 (Sep 17 B-028 'agreement ready to sign'). Legal-threat escalation arc: B-028 COMP-RF04-025 (full custody agreement ready to sign) → B-029 COMP-RF04-028 (contempt case threat with reversed blame for visit refusals). The 'safe home' framing established in B-028 is now weaponized as retrospective legal justification. Attorney must evaluate both compounds as a trajectory.

compound_patterns.label: Feb 15 Incident Amplification — Admitted Fact to Alcoholism Accusation Trajectory
compound_patterns.description: Twenty-ninth compound multi-RF episode. Phase C. Context: Feb 15 2026 argument between Eli and Abby at home, child present; Eli admits raising his voice (ROW-15099, ROW-15106). RF-04 (Sev-2: admitted-incident amplification trajectory — raised voice (Eli's admission) → 'verbal abuse' accusation (ROW-15105) → Olivia 'traumatized by the whole argument' (ROW-15108) → 'drinking problem?' insinuation (ROW-15113 trajectory) → 'You clearly have a drinking problem' explicit accusation (ROW-15498, Mar 28); DARVO mechanism: Eli's self-disclosure of raised voice becomes escalating attack vector; inadequate-father framing escalates from conduct criticism to pathology accusation across 6-week window; ARC-RF04-001-S84) + RF-11 (Olivia positioned as trauma witness; child's reported experience of the argument weaponized as co-parenting concern and visit-refusal justification; ROW-15108 'She said she wants to pause the weekends for now' — child relay deployed as access-denial authority; ARC-RF04-002-S27) + RF-02 (child's stated preference deployed as autonomous gatekeeping justification; 'pause the weekends' child relay serves as visit-refusal mechanism within Melissa's non-accountability framing; extends Phase C visit-refusal cascade into Dec 2025 – Apr 2026 period). Structural note: this is the first compound in the RF-04 dataset built on an admitted incident rather than a disputed or fabricated one — the amplification mechanism is analytically distinct from false allegation trajectory (COMP-RF04-017, RF-04-014). Attorney note: Eli's admission of raised voice is a factual concession; the pattern being documented is the disproportionate amplification trajectory from admitted fact to alcoholism accusation and visit-refusal justification.

compound_patterns.label: Apr 12 Bruise DARVO — Parental Concern Reframed as Abuse Campaign
compound_patterns.description: Thirtieth compound multi-RF episode. Phase C. Dataset closing compound. RF-04 (Sev-2: DARVO reversal — Eli's appropriate bruise welfare check reframed as 'trying to make Olivia think I'm abusing her'; 'keep trying' formulation implies systematic ongoing campaign; 'You didn't make me aware' false denial while Eli just communicated in same thread; ARC-RF04-001-S89) + RF-09 (deliberate mischaracterization of Eli's stated words: 'You asked her if she was being abused' ROW-15595 substitutes Eli's neutral welfare question with accusatory framing; Eli's factual denial denied without evidence) + RF-11 (Olivia as harm-informant relaying to Melissa; ROW-15592 Naomi-peer-parent relay — new mechanism: Olivia's account circulating through peer-parent network, implying Melissa narrative has external social circulation; 'valentine weekend screaming' = Feb 15 incident COMP-RF04-029 still being deployed two months later through third-party channel). RF-15 peripheral (DARVO abuse-direction reversal: Eli's welfare check becomes Eli making abuse allegations against Melissa). Structural note: compound shares architecture with COMP-RF04-026 (Oct 4-7 B-028) and COMP-RF04-017 (Sep 15 B-019) — Eli's parenting actions become the predicate for Melissa's harm-allegation DARVO. The Naomi-relay mechanism is the final new mechanism introduced in the dataset. Attorney note: 'keep trying to make Olivia think I'm abusing her' — 'keep trying' implies ongoing pattern Melissa could deploy in proceedings; attorney should document Eli's actual welfare check vs. Melissa's characterization.
